top3.sql:
SELECT client_id
FROM client
WHERE birth_date BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
  );

SELECT client_id
FROM client
WHERE birth_date BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
  AND district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    WHERE A2 = 'East Bohemia'
  );

SELECT c.client_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', c.birth_date) BETWEEN '1983' AND '1987'
  AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';

SELECT c.client_id
FROM client c
JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.birth_date BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
  AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';

WHERE strftime('%Y', c.birth_date) BETWEEN '1983' AND '1987'
  AND d.A2 = 'East Bohemia';
